# Senseoza

> AI-powered digital marketing agency in Pune, India. We help brands grow through SEO, PPC, social media, content marketing, web design, and AI-driven automation.

Senseoza is a Pune-based digital marketing agency that combines artificial intelligence with proven marketing strategies to deliver measurable business growth. We work with brands across real estate, e-commerce, healthcare, SaaS, hospitality, and more.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Senseoza, our services, results, and clients
- [About](/about): Our mission, vision, team, and approach to AI-driven marketing
- [Services](/services): Full list of digital marketing services we offer
- [Case Studies](/case-studies): Real results from client campaigns
- [Testimonials](/testimonials): Client reviews and feedback
- [Blog](/blog): Insights on SEO, AI marketing, social media, and content strategy
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch for a free consultation

## Services

- [AI Marketing](/services/ai-marketing): AI-powered automation, predictive analytics, and personalization
- [SEO Services](/services/seo): Technical SEO, local SEO, content, and link building in Pune
- [Social Media Marketing](/services/social-media): Strategy and management across Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn
- [Content Marketing](/services/content-marketing): Blog, video, and SEO content creation
- [PPC Advertising](/services/ppc-ads): Google Ads, Meta Ads, and retargeting campaigns
- [Web Design](/services/web-design): High-converting, responsive websites
- [Email Automation](/services/email-automation): Lifecycle and drip email campaigns
- [Analytics & Reporting](/services/analytics): Data dashboards and performance reporting
- [Influencer Marketing](/services/influencer-marketing): Creator partnerships and UGC campaigns
- [AI Agents & Automation](/services/ai-agents-automation): Custom AI agents and workflow automation
